product_overview: HEFESTO IA is an internal web-based ERP/CRM platform that centralizes commercial, financial, operational and administrative workflows behind Supabase authentication and RBAC. The PRD (see pages 1–3) lists modules (Comercial, Financeiro, Operacional, Administrativo, Diretório, Templates, Calendário) and non-functional requirements (Next.js/TypeScript, Supabase, responsive UX).
core_goals: Provide a single-pane-of-glass dashboard aggregating KPIs from Commercial, Finance, Operations and Administrative modules.
Secure user access using Supabase auth and Role-Based Access Control with page/component-level validations.
Streamline commercial workflows (CRM/Kanban, commissions, meetings) and operational task delivery with real-time deadline visibility.
Offer financial controls: transactions, recurring payments, tax tracking, budgets and KPI dashboards.
Maintain a central directory and collaborator management with explicit module access controls and safe confirmation dialogs.
Deliver a polished, responsive UI built on Next.js + TypeScript with reusable components and performant async data fetching.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/password login using Supabase Auth with session management and role validations. The system redirects unauthorized users and enforces RBAC at page and component levels (refer to PRD page 1, section 3.1).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Click login button -> Redirect to / -> View top metrics
Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password (incorrect) -> Click login button -> See authentication error message -> Remain on /login

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated landing page showing high-level KPI aggregation, quick links to core modules, and entry points to module-specific dashboards (see PRD page 1 section 3.2).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View top metrics -> Click 'Comercial' quick link -> Navigate to /comercial -> See commercial KPIs
Navigate to / -> If unauthenticated see redirect to /login -> See login page

features.name: Comercial (CRM & Sales Pipeline)
features.description: Sales pipeline Kanban, client/lead management, meetings scheduling and commission tracking. Users can view and move opportunities across stages and open lead details (see PRD page 1 section 3.3).
user_flows: Navigate to /comercial -> See sales pipeline Kanban -> Click a lead card -> Open lead detail modal -> Drag card to 'Negotiation' column -> Release card -> See updated stage on card
Navigate to /comercial -> Click 'Create Lead' -> Fill name field -> Leave required field (email) empty -> Click Save -> See validation error message -> Stay on create lead form

features.name: Financeiro (Financial Management)
features.description: Transactions & cashflow list, recurring payments, tax tracking, goals and budget planning with KPI dashboards providing real-time financial visibility (see PRD page 2 section 3.4).
user_flows: Navigate to /financeiro -> View transactions list -> Click 'New Transaction' -> Enter amount -> Select type 'Receita' -> Click Save -> See transaction listed
Navigate to /financeiro -> Click 'New Transaction' -> Enter amount as negative value -> Click Save -> See validation error message -> Transaction not created

features.name: Operacional (Tasks & Delivery Radar)
features.description: Operational Kanban for task management, Delivery Radar for upcoming/overdue deadlines, and workload/effort analysis per collaborator (see PRD page 2 section 3.5).
user_flows: Navigate to /operacional -> See task Kanban -> Click 'New Task' -> Enter title -> Assign collaborator -> Click Create -> See task appear in 'To Do' column
Navigate to /operacional -> Open Delivery Radar -> Click overdue task -> View task detail -> Attempt to change status without permission -> See permission denied message

features.name: Administrativo (Internal Demands & Meetings)
features.description: Manage internal demands and meetings using Kanban-style flows and history logs for auditing. Supports statuses like 'Scheduled', 'Concluded', and 'Canceled' (see PRD page 2 section 3.6).
user_flows: Navigate to /administrativo -> Click 'New Demand' -> Enter title -> Enter description -> Click Submit -> See demand in 'Scheduled' column
Navigate to /administrativo -> Click 'New Meeting' -> Leave date field empty -> Click Save -> See validation error message -> Stay on meeting form

features.name: Diretório & Collaborator Management
features.description: Central client database, subscriptions overview, collaborator management (add/edit/deactivate) and module-specific access grants. Uses custom confirmation dialogs for destructive actions (refer PRD page 2 section 3.7).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click 'Directory' quick link -> See client list -> Click a client -> View client profile and subscriptions

Navigate to / -> Click 'Directory' quick link -> Select client -> Click 'Delete' -> See confirmation modal -> Click Confirm -> If authorized see client removed; if unauthorized see permission denied message

features.name: Support Modules (Templates & Calendar)
features.description: Reusable text/email templates and a unified calendar aggregating commercial meetings, administrative events and operational deadlines (see PRD page 2 section 3.8).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click 'Templates' quick link -> Click 'New Template' -> Enter title -> Enter template body -> Click Save -> See template in template list
Navigate to / -> Click 'Calendar' quick link -> View calendar grid -> Click a date without required fields filled when creating event -> Click Save -> See validation error message

features.name: Authentication
user_interactions: Redirect to main dashboard on success

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Overview of user tasks, modules, and relevant indicators.
user_interactions: Navigate to specific modules (operational, commercial, financial, etc.)
